title: Events
content:
Browse our educational events covering a diverse range of topics.
CPD/CLE Requirements and Obligations

- Federal Court of Appeal

- Recent Trends and Developments

- Appellate Litigation
- Corporate Commercial Litigation
- Litigation and Dispute Resolution
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
